content: Backend: schema + auth lib (bcryptjs, jsonwebtoken) + middleware (JWT + PAT + AUTH_ENABLED toggle)
Backend: /api/auth routes (status, signup-first-run, login, me, tokens CRUD)
Frontend: AuthContext + Login + Setup screens + protected routes + axios bearer
Frontend: PAT management in Settings + logout in header
Extension: PAT field in Options, Authorization header in apiFetch, validation via /me
